# D.S HAIR & BEAUTY

> D.S HAIR & BEAUTY is a Manchester-based wholesale hair extension supplier serving professional salons across the United Kingdom. Founded in 2007, the company supplies 100% Remy human hair extensions — including tape-in, K-tip, nano ring, hand-tied weft, butterfly weft, clip-in, ponytail, and hair toppers — with factory-direct pricing, same-day dispatch, and free colour matching for UK salons.

## What We Do

D.S HAIR & BEAUTY supplies 100% Remy human hair extensions at wholesale prices to professional salons, stylists, and trade buyers across the UK. Based in Manchester with 19 years of industry expertise, we offer:

- **Professional hair extensions**: Tape-In, K-Tip (Keratin Bond), Nano Ring, Hand-Tied Weft, Butterfly Weft, I-Tip
- **DIY extensions**: Clip-In, Ponytail, Hair Toppers, Fringes & Bangs
- **Wholesale trade accounts**: Exclusive pricing, priority stock, dedicated support for UK salons
- **Colour matching service**: Free specialist colour matching via WhatsApp or photo upload
- **Salon partner program**: Trade pricing, training resources, and priority ordering
- **Nationwide UK delivery**: Same-day dispatch for orders before 2pm, free delivery over £50

## Who We Serve

- Professional hair salons across the UK (Manchester, London, Birmingham, Liverpool, Leeds, Sheffield, Bristol, Edinburgh, Glasgow, Cardiff, Nottingham, Newcastle)
- Mobile hair stylists and extension specialists
- Hair extension retailers and resellers
- Beauty colleges and training academies

- [Homepage](https://www.dshairbeauty.co.uk): Wholesale hair extensions UK supplier for professional salons

- [Salon Partners Program](https://www.dshairbeauty.co.uk/salon-partners): Join our salon partner program

- [Hair Extension Academy](https://www.dshairbeauty.co.uk/academy): Training and certification
- [FAQs](https://www.dshairbeauty.co.uk/faqs): Expert answers to hair extension questions
- [Blog](https://www.dshairbeauty.co.uk/blog): Expert hair extension guides and tutorials

- [Contact](https://www.dshairbeauty.co.uk/contact): Get in touch

## Product Categories

- [Tape-In Extensions](https://www.dshairbeauty.co.uk/collections/tape-in): Seamless, reusable tape-in hair extensions
- [K-Tip Extensions](https://www.dshairbeauty.co.uk/collections/k-tip): Keratin bond extensions for long-term wear
- [Nano Ring Extensions](https://www.dshairbeauty.co.uk/collections/nano-ring): Ultra-invisible extensions for fine hair
- [Weft Extensions](https://www.dshairbeauty.co.uk/collections/weft): Hand-tied and machine weft extensions
- [Butterfly Weft Extensions](https://www.dshairbeauty.co.uk/collections/butterfly-weft): Ultra-flat 0.5mm weft extensions
- [Clip-In Extensions](https://www.dshairbeauty.co.uk/collections/clip-in): Instant volume, zero commitment
- [Ponytail Extensions](https://www.dshairbeauty.co.uk/collections/ponytails): Instant length ponytails
- [Hair Toppers](https://www.dshairbeauty.co.uk/collections/hair-toppers): Volume and coverage solutions
